steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What is the first letter of the alphabet?
Which letter is the first in 'Cat'?
What is the last letter in the alphabet?

steps.title: Anna's Picnic
steps.text: Hello! I am Anna. I like apples. I have ten red apples in my bag. The sun is big and bright.

steps.audio_text: Hi! My name is Lucy. I have a blue ball. I love playing with my friends at the park.

questions.question: Does Lucy like playing with her friends?

steps.prompt: Say: I have a red apple.

questions.question_text: I ___ Ben. (Grammar question)
Which emoji shows 'teacher'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: 'Hello' is a greeting.
How many apples do you have if you add 3 + 2?
Where is the cat? The cat is ___ the box.

lessons.title: My Family & My Body
lessons.topic: Family, Body Parts, and Personal Descriptions

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Who brings you to school on their bike?
questions.hint: He is your sibling and rides with you.

questions.question_text: Which body part do you use to write?
questions.hint: You hold a pencil with it.

questions.question_text: Who cooks delicious meals in the kitchen?

steps.title: My Family
steps.text: This is my family. I have a brother. His name is Max. Max has a big smile and short hair. He likes to play in the park with me.

questions.question: What does Max like to do?

steps.audio_text: My brother has a big smile. He likes to play soccer in the park. His shoes are always dirty from playing.

questions.question: What does he like to play?

steps.prompt: Say: 'I have a nose and two ears.'
steps.expected_text: i have a nose and two ears

questions.question_text: I ___ Tina. (Grammar question)
Which emoji shows 'father'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: Your 'ears' help you to see.
Where do you wear a hat? ___ your head. (Reading comprehension question)
Which word means 'likes to play'? (Comprehension question)

lessons.title: Animals & School Review
lessons.topic: Farm/Pets, School Bag, Colors, and Emotions

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Which animal says 'Moo' in the video?
What color is the barn in the video?
questions.hint: This is the same color as strawberries.

questions.question_text: How does the farmer feel when all the animals are playing?
questions.hint: The farmer has a big smile.

steps.title: Fun on the Farm
steps.text: I am on the farm. I see a brown horse and a yellow chicken. I have a blue school bag. There is an orange in my bag. I like the big red barn!

questions.question: What is in the school bag?

steps.audio_text: Today at the farm, I saw a big red barn. Inside, there were five brown cows eating hay. The cows looked very happy.

questions.question: How many cows are inside the barn?

steps.prompt: Say: What animal do you like? (Use 'I like ...')

questions.question_text: The cat is ___ the mat. (Grammar question)
Which animal says 'Woof'? (Vocabulary question)
Read: The duck is happy. What is the duck's feeling?
I ___ a pet cat. (Grammar question)
True or False: Blue is a color.

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What is the special item that helps open things?
questions.hint: You turn it to go inside.

questions.question_text: What is standing tall and you can walk through it?
questions.hint: It opens and closes to let you in.

questions.question_text: What action do you do with a key?
questions.hint: You do this to enter a room.

steps.title: Mia's Day
steps.text: Hi! I am Mia. I have a big yellow ball. I like to play in the park. My ball is on the grass. I have a friend. His name is Tom. We are happy!

questions.question: What is the color of Mia's ball?
Where does Mia like to play?

steps.audio_text: Hello, I'm Ben. I have a small orange cat. She likes to sleep on my blue blanket.

questions.question: Does the cat like the blanket?

steps.prompt: Say: Tell me your name, how you feel today, and what toy you like.
steps.expected_text: hello my name is emma i am excited i like my teddy bear

questions.question_text: I ___ a big dog. (Grammar question)
Which emoji shows 'dog'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: A key is used to open doors.
What do you say when meeting someone new?
Where does the cat sleep? (Reading comprehension, from audio script)
